intro:
Hurl everything you can get your hands on!
A hilariously thrilling action defense
to smash the zombie hordes!
description:
The mad scientist, Science X, is on the brink of world domination.

Using the 'Nexus Cube'—an ancient relic capable of transcending time and space—he planned to unleash a lethal zombie virus upon the entire globe. However, his colleagues staged a desperate intervention, shattering the Cube into five fragments and scattering them across the world. Infuriated, Science X has unleashed a massive legion of zombies to reclaim the pieces, leaving cities in ruins.

Governments have fallen, and the world is paralyzed... 
But hope remains.

To the public, they are just an ordinary international shipping company.
But in reality, they are a clandestine intelligence agency: the SDA (Special Delivery Agency). 
To end this nightmare, the SDA dispatches their top secret agent.

Your mission: Locate the scattered fragments of the Nexus Cube,
thwart Science X’s twisted plans, and deliver the world from destruction!


● Easy to Play, Hard to Master
An intuitive action defense game that anyone can jump into! But don't be fooled—survival against the encroaching zombie hordes requires sharp tactics and quick thinking.

● If You Can Grab It, Throw It!
Unleash chaos on endless waves of zombies! From everyday objects to wacky, unexpected weapons—grab anything within reach and experience the pure joy of taking down zombies one toss at a time.

● Epic Chapter Finales
A formidable boss awaits at the end of every chapter. Brace yourself for high-tension, cinematic battles where every move counts. Victory has never felt this satisfying!

● Hilariously Fast-Paced Action
Casual fun meets heart-pounding intensity! If you’re looking for a perfect blend of high-speed action and quirky humor, you’ve found your next obsession.

"Throw Anything: Zombie Invades" invites you
to a world of nonstop laughter and total mayhem!
